request.description: Sign up
Signin

Regenerate JWT token on change sales outlet id. On each change we set additional CSID paramater to JWT token, this paramater store ID of sales outlet that user has been choosed.
This new CSID become to be a current sales outlet.
Generate JWT token based on access token, which was created on create customer with POS. The customer that have no password.
Resset Password
Resset Password

Confirm phone number.
BODY request: 
{
  "openApiKey" : "{{openApiKey}}",
  "countryPhoneCode": "1",
  "phone": "5017122661"
}

BODY response: 
{
	"countryPhoneCode": "1",
    "phone": "5017122661",
    "exists": false
}

"exists" boolean type, shows if the customer with given phone number exists.

Send SMS secure number. 
Returns response with status and sends SMS with secure number to the given phone.
The secret are valid for 60 minutes (one hour).
Client can send request to Auth / Verify Secure Message with this secure number for getting temporary JWT token.
The given JWT token allows to set new password.
BODY request: 
{
  "openApiKey" : "{{openApiKey}}",
  "countryPhoneCode": "1",
  "phone": "5017122661"
}

BODY response:
{
	"countryPhoneCode": "380",
    "phone": "984386471",
    "status": "PENDING_DELIVERY"
}

"status" available types:
PENDING_DELIVERY: Message has been processed and sent for delivery.
REJECTED_SYSTEM_ERROR: The request has been rejected due to system error.

Returns JWT token that can be used to set password in Customer / Set Password API endpoint.

The client has only three attempts, after three wrong attempts  the client will have to make another call to Auth/Send Secure Number to generate another secret.

Get all available delivery options. Based on delivery settings of cusrrent sales outlet.
To make any requests on checkout, please make sure you have set any delivery options for sales outlet.
Calculate sale amount based on PICKUP delivery type.
Calculate sale amount based on PICKUP delivery type with coupons.

Calculate sale amount based on SHIP IT delivery type.
Before send this request you must get all available rates using request Checkout / Delivery Rates. After that tou can choose any of them and set it to body params "serviceCode" and "carrierCode": "UPS".
Calculate sale amount based on LOCAL DELIVERY delivery type. Make sure you get localDeliveryDistance and obtainingWarehouseId by using Checkout / Delivery Distance request.
